metadata.lyrics:
[00:00.75] She had sulky smile
[00:03.19] She took her standard pose, as she presented herself
[00:07.68] She had sultry eyes
[00:10.33] She made it perfectly plain, that she was his for a price
[00:14.16] But he said, leave me alone
[00:16.20] I'm a family man
[00:18.07] And my bark is much worse than my bite
[00:21.58] He said, leave me alone
[00:23.61] I'm a family man
[00:25.07] But if you push me too far i just might
[00:29.98] 
[00:46.90] She wore hurt surprise, as she rechecked her make-up to protect herself
[00:54.45] Dropped her price and pride, she made it totally clear that she was his for a night
[00:57.94] But he said (leave me alone), i'm a family man

[01:09.08] But if you push me too far I just might

[01:28.17] But he said (leave me alone), i'm a family man
